:::: {.content-visible unless-format="pdf"}

# Copyright {.unnumbered .unlisted}

**Assume Breach**\
A First Course in Defensive Security

Copyright © 2026 Michael Borck.

Published by Michael Borck\
Perth, Western Australia

**ISBN:** (to be assigned)

This work is licensed under a **Creative Commons Attribution (CC BY)** licence. You are free to share and adapt the material for any purpose, provided you give appropriate credit. The open-access edition is always the most current.

**AI disclosure:** AI tools were used as thinking partners throughout the drafting, iterating, and refining of this book. The author reviewed, challenged, and took responsibility for every sentence.

**Companion website:** [https://michael-borck.github.io/assume-breach](https://michael-borck.github.io/assume-breach)\
**Source:** [https://github.com/michael-borck/assume-breach](https://github.com/michael-borck/assume-breach)

::::
